|-----------------------------------------------+-------------------------|
|                                               |                         |
|Dear Cardmember,                               |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Warm greetings from HDFC Bank!                 |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|We trust that your experience of using your    |                         |
|HDFC Bank Credit Card has been enjoyable. Your |                         |
|latest E-statement (or duplicate e-statement   |                         |
|requested by you) is attached with this mail.  |                         |
|You will need Internet Explorer version 5.5 or |                         |
|above and Adobe Acrobat to open the attached   |                         |
|file. If you donât have Acrobat, you can       |                         |
|download it from the official Adobe website    |                         |
|www.adobe.com. Please ensure that your Web/IT/ |                         |
|Email administrator permits E-mails with       |                         |
|attachments.                                   |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Your latest E-statement (or duplicate          |                         |
|e-statement as requested by you) is attached   |                         |
|with this mail. You will need Internet Explorer|                         |
|version 5.5 or above and Adobe Acrobat to open |                         |
|the attached file.If you donât have Acrobat,   |                         |
|you can download it from the official Adobe    |                         |
|website www.adobe.com. Please ensure that your |                         |
|Web/IT/Email administrator permits E-mails with|                         |
|attachments.                                   |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Important                                      |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Effective 1st April'12, Service Tax & Cess on  |                         |
|Fees & Charges would be applicable at 12.36% on|                         |
|your HDFC Bank Credit Card, as per revised     |                         |
|Govt. notification.                            |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|-----------------------------------------------+-------------------------|
|                                               |                         |
|Instructions for Opening the E- statement:     |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Click on the attachment provided with this     |                         |
|mail. You will be prompted for your password.  |                         |
|The 8 character password is a combination of   |                         |
|the first 4 characters of your name (as it     |                         |
|appears on your Monthly Statement) and the last|                         |
|4 digits of your 16-digit Credit Card number ( |                         |
|If your card has been upgraded/ reissued       |                         |
|recently, please use the last 4 digits of your |                         |
|new card number).                              |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|For instance,                                  |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   If your name appears on the Monthly Card    |                         |
|   Statement as RAVI SHANKAR with Card number  |                         |
|   as 4346 7710 1122 3456, then the password   |                         |
|   would be RAVI3456                           |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   If your name appears on the Monthly Card    |                         |
|   Statement as R. SHIVA KUMAR with Card number|                         |
|   as 5176 3510 1122 3355, then the password   |                         |
|   would be RSHI3355                           |                         |
|-----------------------------------------------+-------------------------|
|                                               |                         |
|If you encounter any problem in opening your   |                         |
|E-statement, please check whether:             |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   You have entered the first 4 characters of  |                         |
|   your name (ignore spaces and periods, if    |                         |
|   any)                                        |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   You have entered the last 4 digits of your  |                         |
|   card (new card number if it is a reissued   |                         |
|   card)                                       |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   Your web/e-mail administrator allows e-mails|                         |
|   with attachments.                           |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   Depending on your personal spam filter      |                         |
|   settings, your e-statements might be        |                         |
|   directed to your junk folder rather than    |                         |
|   Inbox. Please check in both.                |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Instructions for making payments               |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   If you are an HDFC Bank account holder, you |                         |
|   can pay your Card outstanding through       |                         |
|   NetBanking/ ATM Funds Transfer.             |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   If you do not hold an account with HDFC     |                         |
|   Bank, you can pay your Card outstanding     |                         |
|   through NEFT (Use IFSC code HDFC0000128)/   |                         |
|   Visa Money Transfer                         |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   You can also make your Credit Card payments |                         |
|   online from any other bank account, if you  |                         |
|   do not have an account with HDFC Bank       |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   Alternately, you can pay your card          |                         |
|   outstanding through cheque. Please draw the |                         |
|   cheque favoring your âHDFC Bank credit Card |                         |
|   No. xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxxâ (16-digit card     |                         |
|   number).                                    |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   Write your name and telephone/Mobile No. at |                         |
|   the reverse of the cheque and drop it in an |                         |
|   HDFC Bank drop box placed at your nearest   |                         |
|   HDFC Bank Branch.                           |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|   PLEASE DO NOT DROP CHEQUES AT SKYPAK/OTHER  |                         |
|   DROP BOXES. USE ONLY HDFC BANK DROP BOXES.  |                         |
|-----------------------------------------------+-------------------------|
|                                               |                         |
|For more details on Payment Options, please    |                         |
|check out the âPayment Optionsâ page under the |                         |
|following navigation on our website - Personal |                         |
|Banking > Cards > Payment Options              |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Click here to access Important Statement &     |                         |
|Payment related Information.                   |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|-----------------------------------------------+-------------------------|
|                                               |                         |
|In case you have any queries / clarifications, |                         |
|please call us at our Customer Service Call    |                         |
|Centre number. Please do not reply to this     |                         |
|email.                                         |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Thank you for choosing HDFC Bank E-statement   |                         |
|service.                                       |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|Warm regards                                   |                         |

|Credit Cards Division                          |                         |
|                                               |                         |
|HDFC Bank                                      |                         |
|                                               |                         |

non-receipt of the emails due to ISP server problem, bad/slow connections
or any other technical issue at the end of the ISP / Mail servers or the
cardholder's end. Failure on part of non-receipt of the statement on email
by the cardholder will not avoid the cardholder's liability for the charges
incurred on the HDFC Bank credit card. The cardholder shall be liable to
make the payment for the charges on the statement within the payment due
date. Cardholder undertakes to verify the correctness of each statement or
report in relation to any transaction and to notify the bank within 60 days
of the receipt of the statement or report or before giving any further
instructions thereon, whichever is the earlier, of any discrepancies,
omissions or debits wrongly made or inaccuracies in the statement or report
so generated. If no objection is made within 60 days or before further

account information, transmission activity, account balances and any other
information available on the customerâs personal computer is at customerâs
own risk, sole responsibility and liability. HDFC Bank may withdraw, add to
or modify the internet Banking facilities from time to time by notice to
the customer. While advance notice of maintenance work likely to affect the
Internet Banking facilities shall be given, Bank reserves the right to
suspend, upon notice, access to Internet Banking facilities or the
provision of all or any of the services at any time if the bank deems it
necessary to do so in the event of an emergency (opinion of Bank to be
conclusive in this respect) or for security reasons. Nothing contained
herein shall prejudice or affect the terms and conditions of the card
member agreement. The words and expressions used herein shall have the same
meaning as in the card member agreement. The terms and conditions of this
